entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The target crop for breeding optimization to shorten its breeding cycle

entities.name: PHOTOSENSITIVITY
entities.description: A characteristic of pigeonpea that restricts generation advancement

entities.name: SEASONAL SPECIFICITY
entities.description: A characteristic of pigeonpea that restricts generation advancement

entities.name: BREEDING CYCLE
entities.description: The time taken from cross to cultivar release, which is traditionally long in pigeonpea

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding approach that results in a long breeding cycle

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A technique used to shorten the breeding cycle by optimizing environmental conditions

entities.name: SINGLE SEED DESCENT
entities.description: A breeding method coupled with speed breeding and genotyping

entities.name: SEED OR POD CHIP-BASED GENOTYPING
entities.description: A genotyping technique used for early generation marker assisted selection

entities.name: ICRISAT, HYDERABAD
entities.description: The research institution where the speed breeding experiment was conducted

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD
entities.description: The duration of light exposure used as an indicator for speed breeding success

entities.name: LIGHT WAVELENGTH
entities.description: The specific spectrum of light used to influence growth and flowering stages

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental indicator attributing to the success of speed breeding

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT REGIME
entities.description: An indicator attributing to the success of speed breeding

entities.name: VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: Early growth stage of the crop hastened by broad spectrum light

entities.name: POD FORMATION
entities.description: The stage of pod development hastened by broad spectrum light

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The reproductive stage favoured by far-red light

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: A measured trait affected by photoperiod and genotype interaction

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A measured trait affected by photoperiod and genotype interaction

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A selection process strengthened by seed or pod chip-based genotyping

entities.name: HIGH THROUGHPUT LINE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The ultimate goal of optimizing speed breeding and genotyping techniques
